title: codereview pass 1: coap_status.c map_count update for capacity fields
description: Reviewed encode_status_cbor change. map_count now correctly 9 base + batteries to match  uptime/mem/time/dodag/radio + 4 capacity keys. No P0/P1 found. Zephyr style followed with no added comments. Needs 2 more independent passes before closing p0cd.
